text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a Moderator. We're glad to have you helping keep things running smoothly. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You've been approved as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you supporting our community events. Don't hesitate to ask if you need anything!
Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a Mentor. We're thrilled to have your experience and guidance in the community. Looking forward to seeing the positive impact you'll make!
